9.reason: [Using `gets()` is unsafe and deprecated; it was removed in C11 and causes compilation errors with modern compilers. Use `fgets()` instead.]

29.reason: [This writes beyond the allocated size of array `b` (which has size `len=100`), causing undefined behavior or buffer overflow if `strlen(b)` is already 99.]

66.reason: [Division order is incorrect: should be `d[g] / d[g+1]` but logic assumes left-to-right evaluation without proper precedence handling; also risks division by zero.]
